meaning: n.进化论者,崇拜达尔文之学说者adj.达尔文的
examples: The emerging theory has a nifty, Darwinist buzzword: co-evolution.
Of course, it does not take a Darwinist to work out that any competition has losers.
Even the Darwinist Mr Piech had to adapt to that reality when he became chief executive.
But the pattern of rapidly increasing consolidation is not quite the unstoppable, Darwinist expansion that it seems.
For example, I often run into criticism of my notion that homeostasis makes evolution a far more intention-driven process than the Darwinist idea can comfortably accommodate.
